titleStmt.title: SII 17.298: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 298. (A.R. No. 270 of 1904.) YŌGIMALLAVARAM, PUTTUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Parāśarēśvara temple.
This inscription commences with the praśasti, Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga, etc., of the king.

This records the grant by the kings, of the village of Muññaipppūṇḍi alias Śivapādasēkharanallūr as a dēvadāna, made free of tax, to god Tippalādīśvaramuḍaiya-mahādēva in Tiruchchukanūr, in Tiruvēṅgaḍa-kkōṭṭam in Rājēndraśōḻamaṇḍalam at the request of Bhāradvāji Kaṇṇan Vāsudēvan alias Iruṇīkki Ulagāṇḍachōḻa-Brahma-mārāyan of Kuḍavūr-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇar[ ntu] rimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi minavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Enai maṉnava ririya luṟṟiḻitarat tik kaṉaittun tan cakkara naṭātti vijaiya Apiṣegam paṇṇi viraśiṁhāsaṉattu Avaṉi muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripanma rāṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattāṟāvatu
rājentracoḻa maṇṭalattut tiruveṅkaṭak koṭṭattu tiruccukanur tippalātiśvaramuṭaiya māmahatevarkku Ivvūr bramama yaāḷuṅkaṇattāruḷ bāradvāji kaṇṇan vāsutevanāna Iruṇikki Ulakāṇṭa coḻa brahmamaārāyan Ittevar tānam muññaipūṇṭiyāna civapātacekaranallūr tirupperāluḷḷa māṭai Añcum tavun=tu I tevatāṉamākaikku cakkiravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevar
kku yāṇṭu muppattu Āṟāvatu mutal māṇikkaṅkāṭṭikaḷ kuṭavūr nāṭṭu kaṇṇa vāsa tevan viṇṇappañceyya muññaipūṇṭi Uṭaiyār Iṟaiyili tevatānamāka kuṭuttomeṉṟu tiruvāymoḻin=taruḷinamaikku Ivai puravuvari tiṉaikkaḷattu muka veṭṭi kāñcikkuṟiyuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai pūrovari tiṉaikkaḷattu maṇappākkiḻān Eḻuttu puravari tiṉaikkaḷa nāyakam Accūceri Uṭaiyān Eḻuttu
puravari tiṉaikkaḷa nāyakam kaṉṉan muttuṉaiyan Eḻuttu Ivai puravari tiṉaikkaḷa nāyakaṉ ruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu, Ivai puravari tiṉaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi kāvanūr kiḻavan Eḻuttu Ivai puravari tiṉaikkaḷattu mukattuveṭṭi neṭuṅkaṇṇan Eḻuttu Ivai nāṅ koṟṟan Eḻuttu Ivai kaṭuvaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu ....
Digital edition of SII 17.298 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
